feed.title: Chinese as a Second Language Research
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Chinese as a Second Language Research (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Introduction
entry.summary: Authors: Caitríona Osborne, Qi Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2001 Pages: Page range: 1-9

entry.title: Readiness for digital transformation in Chinese as a foreign language education: a semi-systematic review
entry.summary: Authors: Qi Zhang, Caitríona Osborne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2002 Pages: Page range: 11-43

entry.title: ChatGPT Voice Mode in CFL beginner classrooms: insights from learner interactions and experiences in the Austrian upper secondary school context
entry.summary: Authors: Julia Renner, Stefanie Yu, Andreas Guder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2003 Pages: Page range: 45-68

entry.title: A bite of China’s language: a case study of data-driven learning of food-related metaphors
entry.summary: Authors: Yi Xu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2004 Pages: Page range: 69-98

entry.title: 多模视听语料库在对外汉语教学中的应用探索: 以 “为什么” 和 “怎么” 的语用教学为例
entry.summary: Authors: Lingzhi Nie, Sara Rovira-Esteva DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2005 Pages: Page range: 99-129

entry.title: AI 生成主题化歌曲对高级中文学习者的习得影响研究 – 基于 “环境 – 情感 – 认知 – 动机” 级联模型
entry.summary: Authors: Fang Su DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2006 Pages: Page range: 131-156

entry.title: 中文线上口语教学转型的可行性研究 – 以法国某大学中文系为例
entry.summary: Authors: Wenlong Wang, Chong Qi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/caslar-2026-2007 Pages: Page range: 157-174
